issues.description: TrashFromHand should have optional:true to reflect 'You may trash' phrasing. Current structure forces trash before KO.
Both KO actions should be independent choices, not sequential thenActions. Card allows choosing 'up to 1' of each cost tier separately, not conditionally on trash.

Second KO targets cost 3 or less, but first KO already targets cost 5 or less. No overlap restriction specified in text—both can target same character or different ones. Current structure doesn't allow independent selection.
